title: harness-universal config
description: Project-specific values for the 9-agent harness. See README_HARNESS.md §2.

project_name.description: Display name of the project. Used in agent outputs and summaries.

actor_role.description: Primary user/actor role label injected into agent prompts (replaces generic 'user'). Examples: 'Owner', 'PM', 'Founder', 'Captain'.

roadmap_doc.description: Path to roadmap/PRD/scenario document used by qa Step 4.5 and planner Deferred Decision Hygiene. null if no roadmap doc.

scenario_id_pattern.description: Pattern for scenario IDs in roadmap_doc (e.g. 'UC-1~UC-10', 'S1-S17'). null if not used.

drift_check_docs.description: Paths plan-reviewer Step 4.5 cross-checks for silent conflicts. Empty array = skip Step 4.5 entirely. Non-existent files soft-skip with INFO note.

domain_vocab.description: Domain-specific terminology for product-designer/reviewer to reference when validating data sources / accounts / channels.

test_commands.description: Shell commands dev/qa execute and planner injects into sprint-contract AC.

coverage_targets.description: plan-reviewer Step 3 reference values. Module names are project-specific.

loop_limits.description: Iteration caps per generator-evaluator pair. All defaults to 3.
